title: Email Forwarding
summary: Forward the client's bid-desk inbox to Bids@BuildVision.io so bids ingest automatically — the backbone of the workflow.
overview:
Email ingestion is the **backbone of the BuildVision workflow**. Once orgs exist and the IT/ops contact is engaged, forward the client's bid-desk inbox to **Bids@BuildVision.io** and prove ingestion end-to-end before moving on.

The full step-by-step for **Gmail / Google Workspace**, **Outlook on the web**, and **classic Outlook desktop** is in the *Configure email forwarding* step below (and in the [downloadable Email Forwarding Guide](/guides/email-forwarding-guide.pdf)).

**Before you start:**
- **Verification email** — the first time the address is added, Gmail/Outlook send a one-time verification message to Bids@BuildVision.io. Email your CX lead to confirm BuildVision received it.
- **External forwarding may be blocked** — many Microsoft 365 / Google Workspace accounts disable external forwarding by default (this causes the **5.7.520 bounce**). Coordinate with the client's IT/admin to approve it before testing.

> If a client prefers to connect their inbox directly instead of forwarding, use the **Email Connector** section — pick one path, not both.
prerequisites: Parent organization exists (ingestion attaches to an org)
Client IT/ops contact confirmed and available
Exact bid-desk inbox address captured during intake
External forwarding approved by the client's IT/admin (M365 / Google Workspace)
tips: Forwarding vs connecting the inbox are two paths to the same result — pick one.
Gmail: use a **filter** so only project emails forward (by sender/domain, subject like Bid/RFQ/Proposal/Quote, and Has attachment). Desktop browser only — the mobile app can't set this up.
Outlook: use **Forward to**, not **Redirect to** — Redirect strips your team's name and sends replies to the original sender.
Layer multiple Gmail filters (one per contractor / distribution list) — all forward to Bids@BuildVision.io without duplicating.
Send the client's IT the ready-made forwarding request snippet (copy it from any snippet button).
warnings: Gmail: add the filter **after** setting up the forwarding address — otherwise every email in the inbox forwards.
Only the past 30 days of matching email are extracted (or the window agreed in the pilot contract). Gmail filters can't be time-bound, so all matching mail is sent.
Do not advance to go-live QA until a real forwarded message has been ingested successfully.
commonMistakes: Forwarding is configured but never tested with a real message.
The forwarding address is added but not verified on the client side, so the rule silently fails.
A too-narrow filter drops bid emails from senders that weren't allow-listed.
External forwarding is left blocked by IT policy, producing a 5.7.520 bounce.

steps.title: Prerequisite check
steps.description: Confirm the IT/ops contact is confirmed and available, an org exists to attach ingestion to, and external forwarding is approved by the client's IT/admin.

steps.title: Configure email forwarding
steps.description:
Set up forwarding from the client's bid-desk inbox to **Bids@BuildVision.io**, then add a filter/rule so only project emails forward. Follow the client's mail system:

### Gmail / Google Workspace
Gmail forwards via a **filter** so only matching messages reach BuildVision. Desktop browser only.

**Step 1 — Add & verify the forwarding address**
1. Gear icon → **See all settings** → **Forwarding and POP/IMAP**.
2. Under Forwarding → **Add a forwarding address** → enter `Bids@BuildVision.io` → Next → Proceed → OK.
3. Gmail emails a verification message to Bids@BuildVision.io; your CX lead confirms it on our side. Once confirmed it shows as verified.

**Step 2 — Filter project emails**
1. Gear → See all settings → **Filters and Blocked Addresses** → **Create a new filter**.
2. Criteria: **From** a contractor / distribution list / domain (e.g. `@contractordomain.com`), or **Subject** contains `Bid, RFQ, Proposal, Quote`.
3. Check **Has attachment** so drawings, schedules, and specs come through.
4. **Create filter** → check **Forward it to** → select `Bids@BuildVision.io`.
5. Check **Also apply filter to matching conversations** to forward existing project emails too → **Create filter**.

### Outlook on the web (Microsoft 365 / Outlook.com)
1. Sign in at `outlook.office.com` (or `outlook.live.com` for personal accounts).
2. **Settings → Mail → Rules → Add new rule**.
3. Name it (e.g. *Forward bids to BuildVision*).
4. Condition: **From** a contractor / domain, **Subject includes** `Bid, RFQ, Proposal, Quote`, or **Has attachment**.
5. Action: **Forward to** → `Bids@BuildVision.io`. **Avoid Redirect to.**
6. **Save** — applies to new mail immediately.

### Classic Outlook desktop (Windows)
1. **File → Manage Rules & Alerts → New Rule → Apply rule on messages I receive → Next**.
2. Conditions: *from people or public group* (contractors) and/or *with specific words in the subject* (`Bid, RFQ, Proposal, Quote`); under actions check **forward it to people or public groups**.
3. Click the underlined **people or public group**, enter `Bids@BuildVision.io` → OK.
4. **Finish → Apply**.
steps.verify: Forwarding rule/filter shows active on the client side.

callouts.text: Gmail: create the filter right after adding the forwarding address, or **all** email forwards. Also apply to matching conversations to backfill existing project mail (extraction covers ~30 days or the pilot-agreed window).

steps.title: Verify the forwarding rule is live
steps.description: Confirm the forwarding rule/filter is active on the client side and the verification message was confirmed by the CX lead.
steps.verify: Rule status shows active; verification confirmed by CX; no 5.7.520 bounce.

steps.title: Test ingestion end-to-end (gate)
steps.description: Send a test bid to the forwarded inbox and confirm it lands in BuildVision within the expected window.
steps.verify: Test bid appears in BuildVision, attached to the correct org.

callouts.text: Do not advance to go-live QA until a real forwarded message has been ingested successfully.

screenshots.caption: Get bids flowing in — connect your inbox, or upload a document to try it on something specific first.
Gmail: open the gear menu → “See all settings” to reach forwarding and filters.
Create a filter for bid-related senders (with Has attachment), then forward matching mail to Bids@BuildVision.io.
